MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter continued on the Court's own motion to September 2, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bradley D. Fell, Esq. (925-465-0307; brad@goldengatelawgroup.com) of Golden Gate Law Group for Plaintiff.
Gregory Jordan Lewis, Esq. (415-288-9800; gjl@hassard.com) of Hassard Bonnington LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) re: Mr. Fell's disclosure statement, untimely 170.6 challenge and request to allow time to file 170.1 challenge. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is continued to August 23, 2021 at 9:30am, Law and Motion Dept. Any 170.1 to be filed by August 18, 2021.
